mapper.select: select pm.id, pm.src_user_id as srcUserId, pm.tar_user_id as tarUserId, pm.content, pm.img, pm.msg_time as time, pm.is_read as status, u.username, u.another_name as anotherName, u.picture from private_msg pm left join user u on u.id = pm.src_user_id where pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0 order by pm.msg_time desc limit #{index}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from private_msg pm where pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0

select c.peer_id as peerId, u.username, u.another_name as anotherName, u.picture, m.id as lastMsgId, m.content as lastContent, m.msg_time as lastTime, case when m.src_user_id = #{userId} then 1 else 0 end as fromSelf, ifnull(unread.unreadCount, 0) as unreadCount from ( select distinct case when pm.src_user_id = #{userId} then pm.tar_user_id else pm.src_user_id end as peer_id from private_msg pm where (pm.src_user_id = #{userId} and pm.src_deleted = 0) or (pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0) ) c join private_msg m on ( ( (m.src_user_id = #{userId} and m.tar_user_id = c.peer_id and m.src_deleted = 0) or (m.src_user_id = c.peer_id and m.tar_user_id = #{userId} and m.tar_deleted = 0) ) and not exists ( select 1 from private_msg nx where ( (nx.src_user_id = #{userId} and nx.tar_user_id = c.peer_id and nx.src_deleted = 0) or (nx.src_user_id = c.peer_id and nx.tar_user_id = #{userId} and nx.tar_deleted = 0) ) and ( nx.msg_time > m.msg_time or (nx.msg_time = m.msg_time and nx.id > m.id) ) ) ) left join user u on u.id = c.peer_id left join ( select src_user_id as peer_id, count(*) as unreadCount from private_msg where tar_user_id = #{userId} and tar_deleted = 0 and is_read = 0 group by src_user_id ) unread on unread.peer_id = c.peer_id order by m.msg_time desc, m.id desc limit #{index}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from ( select distinct case when pm.src_user_id = #{userId} then pm.tar_user_id else pm.src_user_id end as peer_id from private_msg pm where (pm.src_user_id = #{userId} and pm.src_deleted = 0) or (pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0) ) t

select pm.id, pm.src_user_id as srcUserId, pm.tar_user_id as tarUserId, pm.content, pm.img, pm.msg_time as time, pm.is_read as status, su.username as srcUsername, su.another_name as srcAnotherName, su.picture as srcPicture, tu.username as tarUsername, tu.another_name as tarAnotherName, tu.picture as tarPicture from private_msg pm left join user su on su.id = pm.src_user_id left join user tu on tu.id = pm.tar_user_id where ( pm.src_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_user_id = #{peerId} and pm.src_deleted = 0 ) or ( pm.src_user_id = #{peerId} and pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0 ) order by pm.msg_time asc limit 200
mapper.insert: insert into private_msg ( src_user_id, tar_user_id, content, img, msg_time, is_read, src_deleted, tar_deleted ) values ( #{srcUserId}, #{tarUserId}, #{content}, #{img}, #{time}, 0, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: update private_msg set is_read = 1 where tar_user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0 and tar_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from private_msg where tar_user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0 and tar_deleted = 0
